title: Settings
subtitle: Customize UI, behavior, and server setup

tabs.serversDesc: Backend connections and fast active endpoint switching
tabs.chatDesc: Reasoning style, path display, and conversation behavior
tabs.appearanceDesc: Theme, color mode, and layout preferences
tabs.shortcutsDesc: Customize keyboard shortcuts for faster workflows

servers.connectionsDesc: Manage backend endpoints and choose which server this session uses
servers.name: Name
servers.crossOriginWarning: Cross-origin + password may not work in some browsers due to CORS restrictions.
servers.credentialsStorage: Credentials are stored in localStorage and sent via HTTP Basic Auth.
servers.deleteServerConfirm: Remove "{{name}}" from the server list? This cannot be undone.

chat.pathsFormattingDesc: How file paths are displayed in messages and tools
chat.autoApproveDesc: Use local rules for always, send once to server
chat.sidebarRecentsDesc: Optional folder view for recent chats
chat.folderStyleRecentsDesc: Group recent chats by project folder while keeping the default list available
chat.conversationExperienceDesc: Message density, reasoning style, and step summary fields
chat.descriptiveToolStepsDesc: Replace plain step counts with tool-aware summaries and show a steps line even for single tool calls
chat.inlineToolRequestsDesc: Show pending permission and question requests under the related tool call instead of floating dialogs
chat.compactInlinePermissionDesc: When the tool already shows content, only display action buttons for permissions to avoid duplication
chat.toolCardStyleDesc: Choose how tool call results are displayed
chat.immersiveModeDesc: Enable inline requests, descriptive steps and compact output together for a cleaner experience
chat.thinkingDisplayDesc: Choose capsule, low-noise italic, or markdown reasoning style

appearance.themePresetsDesc: Choose a base visual style for the app
appearance.customCssDesc: Override fonts, colors, and any CSS variables. Works with all themes.
appearance.customCssHelp: Override fonts, colors, and styles with custom CSS.
appearance.customCssSpecificityHelp: Override fonts, colors, and styles. Use <1>:root:root</1> for higher specificity.
appearance.wideModeDesc: Expand chat area for long outputs
appearance.diffStyleDesc: How changes are indicated in the diff gutter
appearance.codeWordWrapDesc: Wrap code blocks and diffs to the available width to reduce horizontal scrolling
appearance.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the interface

notifications.notifyWhenComplete: Notify when AI completes a response
notifications.notAvailable: System notifications are not available in this environment
notifications.inAppAlertsDesc: Toast notifications for background session events
notifications.soundEnabledDesc: Play notification sounds for session events
notifications.currentSessionSoundDesc: Also play sounds for events in the active session
notifications.eventSoundsDesc: Configure notification sounds for each event type
notifications.eventPermissionDesc: When a session needs your approval
notifications.eventQuestionDesc: When AI is waiting for your input
notifications.eventErrorDesc: When a session encounters an error
notifications.supportedFormats: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, AAC, WebM
notifications.soundNotSupported: Sound playback is not supported in this environment

service.desktopOnlyDesc: This section is available on desktop app only
service.webModeDesc: OpenCode web mode connects to external servers and does not manage a local background service
service.localServiceDesc: Manage embedded opencode serve startup, status, and environment
service.binaryPathHelp: Leave empty to use opencode from PATH. Or enter full path to the binary.
service.autoStartDesc: Run opencode serve automatically when app launches
service.envVarsDesc: Passed to the opencode serve process (e.g. HTTPS_PROXY, API keys)

keybindings.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keybindings.clickToRebind: Click a shortcut to rebind. Enter confirm, Esc cancel.
